wordplay_note: Descartes doubted reality; Deckard doubts who is human
card_description: Rick Deckard (meaning ""Deck of cards" / echoes Descartes") is a character in Philip K. Dick's *Do Androids Dream of Electric Sheep?*. Bounty hunter tasked with retiring six Nexus-6 androids on a depopulated Earth. Name note: Descartes doubted reality; Deckard doubts who is human. Embodies PKD's central question: what constitutes authentic humanity?. First appears in *Do Androids Dream of Electric Sheep?*.
first_work: Do Androids Dream of Electric Sheep?
work_list: Do Androids Dream of Electric Sheep?
